Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Enum Class BusinessKnowledgeModel

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<BusinessKnowledgeModel>
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.BusinessKnowledgeModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<BusinessKnowledgeModel>, Constable
public enum BusinessKnowledgeModel extends Enum<BusinessKnowledgeModel>

Java class for BusinessKnowledgeModel

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <simpleType name="BusinessKnowledgeModel">
   <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string">
     <enumeration value="CreditPoints"/>
     <enumeration value="DebitPoints"/>
     <enumeration value="IssueVoucher"/>
     <enumeration value="IncreaseUsageForCumulativePromotion"/>
     <enumeration value="UpdateUsageForCumulativePromotion"/>
     <enumeration value="AssignParameterValues"/>
     <enumeration value="RunFlow"/>
     <enumeration value="GetOutputsFromDecisionTable"/>
     <enumeration value="UpdatePointBalance"/>
     <enumeration value="GetMemberPointBalance"/>
     <enumeration value="GetMemberTier"/>
     <enumeration value="BreAggregator"/>
     <enumeration value="GetOutputsFromDecisionMatrix"/>
     <enumeration value="GetMemberAttributesValues"/>
     <enumeration value="UpdateCurrentValueForMemberAttribute"/>
     <enumeration value="BreAggregatorAssignment"/>
     <enumeration value="Crud"/>
     <enumeration value="AssignBadgeToMember"/>
     <enumeration value="CheckMemberBadgeAssignment"/>
     <enumeration value="ChangeMemberTier"/>
     <enumeration value="RunProgramProcess"/>
     <enumeration value="GetMemberPromotions"/>
     <enumeration value="TestCustomElement"/>
     <enumeration value="AIAcceleratorSubscriberChurnPrediction"/>
     <enumeration value="RedeemVoucher"/>
     <enumeration value="ListPrice"/>
     <enumeration value="PriceAdjustmentMatrix"/>
     <enumeration value="SendMail"/>
     <enumeration value="VolumeDiscount"/>
     <enumeration value="GetUserData"/>
     <enumeration value="ListGroupCalculation"/>
     <enumeration value="RecordAlert"/>
     <enumeration value="AutomatedClaimsProcessingValidation"/>
     <enumeration value="EvaluateQualification"/>
     <enumeration value="SampleBusinessElementWithContext"/>
     <enumeration value="EvaluateDisqualification"/>
     <enumeration value="SampleDynamicCustomElement"/>
   </restriction>
 </simpleType>
